subcodes.first_line: The Pen proclaimeth and saith: I have been withheld from the mysteries of eternity and from making mention of the pearls of the Most Great Sea, whereof every drop [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم ینادی و یقول قد منعت من اسرار القدم و ذکر لئالی بحر الاعظم الذی کل قطره
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
